value.stringValue: Proof of right to work created
You need to upload both documents

choices.name: WTR_Agreement
choices.choiceText: I wish to waive the restriction of the 48 hour working week, this will allow me to work more than 48 hours per week

choices.name: WTR_Non_Agreement
choices.choiceText: I do not wish to waive the restriction of the 48 hour working week, this will restrict my working week to a maximum of 48 hours

rightValue.stringValue: Citizen of a Non-UK/Republic of Ireland Country
Citizen of a Non-UK/Republic of Ireland Country

Flow.description: PT1-1222 RTW Sponsorship VISA and Online RTW Check
Flow.label: Online Registration - PORTW

fields.name: Screen3_DISPLAY_0
fields.fieldText:
Proof of Right to Work


﻿﻿Identification Details

fields.name: Nationality
fields.fieldText: What is your current Nationality?

value.stringValue: What Citizenship Group do you come under?
Which type of identification are you providing?

fields.name: OnlineCheckHeader
fields.fieldText:
Online Checking Service

In order for us to offer you work we need to verify your eligibility to work in the UK. The easiest way to do this is to use the online Government checking service, this service will generate a unique right to work share code you can provide to us down below which will allow us to check your right to work remotely. To access this service and for more information use the link below:


https://www.gov.uk/prove-right-to-work


If you are not able to do this you will have to come into one of our many branches so we can verify your right to work in person.

fields.name: TimelImited
fields.fieldText: Is your right to work in the United Kingdom time limited (has an expiry) or indefinite (no expiry)?

rightValue.stringValue: Citizen of a Non-UK/Republic of Ireland Country

fields.name: Student_Visa
fields.fieldText: Do you have a Student Visa?

fields.name: Do_you_have_a_sponsorship_VISA
fields.fieldText: Do you have a Sponsorship VISA?

fields.name: What_is_your_job_title
fields.fieldText: What is your job title?

fields.name: What_is_the_Occupation_Code
fields.fieldText: What is the Occupation Code?

fields.name: PORTWShareCode
fields.fieldText: What is your right to work share code?

fields.name: NonUKValid
fields.fieldText: What date is your identification document valid from?

validationRule.errorMessage: The valid from date should be before the expiration date

rightValue.stringValue: Citizen of a Non-UK/Republic of Ireland Country

fields.name: UKExpire
fields.fieldText: What date does your identification document expire?

fields.name: NonUKExpire
fields.fieldText: What date does your identification document expire?

validationRule.errorMessage: Your document must be current with an expiry date in the future

rightValue.stringValue: Citizen of a Non-UK/Republic of Ireland Country

fields.name: NI_Text
fields.fieldText: National Insurance Details

fields.name: National_Insurance_Number
fields.fieldText: What is your National Insurance Number?

validationRule.errorMessage: Please enter a valid National Insurance number with no spaces

fields.name: National_Insurance_Proof_Type
fields.fieldText: National Insurance Proof Type

fields.name: Tick_here_if_you_don_t_yet_have_your_National_Insurance_number
fields.fieldText: Tick here if you don't yet have your National Insurance number.

fields.name: Temp_NI_Text
fields.fieldText: Haven't yet received your National Insurance number? Don't worry. Just fill in the following information. We can generate a temporary one for you.

fields.name: Date_of_Birth
fields.fieldText: Date of Birth

fields.fieldText: For further details on how we use and store your data please review our privacy notice.

value.stringValue: Please upload your certificate of sponsorship
